title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: IsAuthBypassURL name is misleading (returns true for paths needing full auth handling). A rename or doc comment would reduce future confusion.
kubernetesResourceAPIPathIndex extracted as DRY shared helper — eliminates 3 separate copies of path-parsing logic.
TestIsKubernetesResourceAPIPath covers proxied and direct API paths and non-API paths.
TestCacheMiddleware_BypassesNonKubernetesAPIPaths verifies no X-HEADLAMP-CACHE header on /healthz and /readyz.
GetAPIGroup and ExtractNamespace now support direct /api/ and /apis/ paths — bonus correctness from the refactor.
